test_sufficiency_summary: 53/53 navigation service tests pass (37 pre-existing + 16 new). Admin bypass confirmed via not.toHaveBeenCalled() assertions. Predicate-pinning tests verify status/slug/publishedAt constraints in blog queries and status/slug in page queries. Coverage is sufficient for all acceptance criteria. Three minor gaps noted: no moderator-role test, no empty-children-after-filter test, missing admin test comment. No delivery or security risk from these gaps.
